embeds.title: Case Study of Elias Breuer
embeds.description: knock knock  “Come in, Dr. Franklin.”  	Accordingly, the door gave sway; the hinges of the worn frame howled akin to a diseased feline, and with the unveiling of the wooden facade revealed an attractive being. Bearing a tall stature with lean physique; in particular, their slender fingers gently ...
